description: Style NoteCut a dash with these shoes for the cosmopolitan male from red tape. Inspired by the rugged Texas plains and the cowboy lifestyle from a bygone era, these leather shoes pay homage to the Wild West. Wear them with stone washed denims, a casual plaid shirt and a stylish leather jacket.Product DetailsBrown derby shoe with high quality leather upper, reinforced overlays and central lace-upsHigh on ankle for stylePadded tongue and innerUpper adhered to the outsoleTPU outsole with patterned lugs and an upraised heelMaterial and CareLeatherUse a brush or dry cloth to keep your footwear cleanDo not store under sunlight
